title: viburnum tengyuehense
intro: Viburnum tengyuehense is a species of flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae, commonly known as the Tengyueh Viburnum or Chinese Snowball Viburnum. Traditionally, Viburnum tengyuehense is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system. Viburnum tengyuehense is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction for medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
